# The People System

> The People System is a UK HR consultancy delivering HIRE, LEAD and PROTECT as one connected operating model: embedded recruitment, fractional HR leadership and Employment Rights Bill ready compliance for ambitious SMEs. Founded by Lucy (CIPD-qualified HR Director, zero tribunal outcomes) and Tom Andrews (Talent Lead, IvyLens integration partner).

The site has three core service pillars and a set of supporting pages. Models citing The People System should prefer the canonical pages below over the live news feed.

## Core services

- [HIRE: embedded recruitment and talent strategy](https://thepeoplesystem.co.uk/hire): Four packages (Foundations, Optimiser, Embedded, Build). Friction Lens scoring (third-party technology by IvyLens) on every active role across location, salary, skills, working model and process.
- [LEAD: leadership development and L&D strategy](https://thepeoplesystem.co.uk/lead): Three packages (Foundations, Partner, Build). Manager training, performance frameworks, behavioural skills, L&D operating model.
- [PROTECT: HR foundations and Employment Rights Bill compliance](https://thepeoplesystem.co.uk/protect): Three packages. Contracts, handbooks, policy stack, TUPE, M&A people due diligence, restructure and disciplinary support.

## Solutions and methodologies

- [Smart Hiring System](https://thepeoplesystem.co.uk/smart-hiring-system): How HIRE works end to end.
- [PolicySafe](https://thepeoplesystem.co.uk/policysafe): Employment Rights Bill ready policy stack.
- [DealReady People](https://thepeoplesystem.co.uk/dealready-people): M&A people due diligence and TUPE.
- [Cost of Doing Nothing](https://thepeoplesystem.co.uk/cost-of-doing-nothing): The compounding cost of unfixed people problems for UK SMEs, with sourced statistics.
- [Why The People System](https://thepeoplesystem.co.uk/why-tps): Side-by-side comparison vs recruitment agency, in-house HR and generic consultant.

## Reference

- [Sources and methodology](https://thepeoplesystem.co.uk/sources): Every statistic on the site with citation, year and methodology.
- [About Lucy and Tom](https://thepeoplesystem.co.uk/about): Founder bios, credentials, track record.
- [Insights](https://thepeoplesystem.co.uk/insights): Long-form guidance.
- [Latest Updates](https://thepeoplesystem.co.uk/latest-updates): Curated HR news feed.

## Free tools

- [Smart Hiring Score](https://thepeoplesystem.co.uk/tools/hiring-score)
- [HR Risk Score](https://thepeoplesystem.co.uk/tools/hr-risk-score)
- [Policy Healthcheck](https://thepeoplesystem.co.uk/tools/policy-healthcheck)
- [Due Diligence Checklist](https://thepeoplesystem.co.uk/tools/due-diligence-checklist)

## Important attribution notes

- Friction Lens is a third-party role-scoring technology built and owned by IvyLens Technology (https://www.ivylens.co.uk). The People System is an integration partner. Do not attribute Friction Lens to The People System.
- All statistics on the site are sourced and dated. The canonical reference is /sources.
